message:
feat(fcp-host): change discovery capability fields from bool to Option<bool>

Change supports_streaming, supports_batching on DiscoveryResponse and
supports_simulate on ToolDescriptor from bool to Option<bool> to
distinguish "host cannot prove this capability" (None) from "known
unsupported" (Some(false)). Add skip_serializing_if for clean JSON
omission of unknown values. Update all test fixtures and assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

             approval_mode: None,
             requires_confirmation: false,
             idempotent: false,
-            supports_simulate: false,
+            supports_simulate: Some(false),
             latency_hint: None,
             rate_limits: vec![],
             examples: vec![],
